auth.label: API Key
auth.description: OpenStatus API key sent with the x-openstatus-key header. Create it from the OpenStatus dashboard: https://www.openstatus.dev/app.

actions.name: create_http_monitor
actions.description: Create a new OpenStatus HTTP monitor.

periodicity.description: How often OpenStatus should run the monitor.

method.description: HTTP method used by the monitor.

body.description: Request body to send with the monitor check.

anyOf.description: Latency threshold in milliseconds before the monitor is marked degraded.
Whether the monitor should follow HTTP redirects.

target.description: Target body value to compare against.
Target header value to compare against.

public.description: Whether the monitor is publicly visible.

regions.description: Regions used to run or filter monitor checks.

headers.description: Headers sent to the OpenTelemetry endpoint.

openTelemetry.description: OpenTelemetry export configuration for monitor metrics.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating an OpenStatus HTTP monitor.

monitor.description: OpenStatus monitor returned by the API.

actions.description: Delete an OpenStatus monitor by ID.

success.description: Whether OpenStatus completed the operation successfully.
